# Prompt: Follow-up Issue Creation

Use this prompt when important work is intentionally deferred to preserve scope and safety.

## Objective

Create a high-quality follow-up issue that is independently actionable and traceable.

## Required Fields

- Title
- Problem statement
- Desired outcome
- Acceptance criteria
- Why deferred now
- Risk if not completed
- Suggested priority and dependencies

## Rules

- Follow-up issue must not hide unfinished acceptance criteria for current issue.
- Follow-up issue must be linked in PR and closure records.
- Keep language factual and implementation-ready.
